'''''Vengeance Derra IV''''' was a [[Dwarf Star-class freighter|''Dwarf Star''-class freighter]] modified to serve as a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] under [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

==History==
After the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] took control of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] stronghold on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]], Zsinj dispatched this ship to confirm the New Republic presence and probe the defenses of the [[Pyria system]]. Using a secret backdoor [[Slicer/Legends|sliced]] into the New Republic's authentication system, ''Vengeance Derra IV'' nearly fooled the [[Champion Squadron]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] on system patrol.

[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], following a hunch, chose to challenge the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]. The freighter refused to slow, and launched four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] and two [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]]. In the ensuing [[Skirmish near Borleias|battle]], Horn and the Y-wings destroyed five of the fighters, disabled one bomber, and damaged ''Vengeance Derra IV'' enough to drive her away.

Later, the New Republic ordered [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to launch a retaliatory strike against the freighter, and they attacked it over [[Mrisst/Legends|Mrisst]]. Despite the assistance of a new set of TIE fighters and a second [[Starship/Legends|starship]], ''[[Contruum's Pride]]'', ''Vengeance Derra IV'' was so crippled that she required assistance to keep from crashing into the planet.
